messages.text: Hello! Welcome to the Grievance Registration System. I am here to help you register your complaint today. May I know your full name please?
Thank you, Nagraj! Could you tell me which category your issue falls under? Is it Water Supply, Electricity, Road, Sanitation, Network, or something else?

So, Nagraj, I've noted that you're experiencing an issue with potholes on the road. According to our records, you can report this to the BBMP helpline number 1533 with the exact location and photos of the potholes. Temporary patching is required within 24 hours for accident-prone areas, and permanent repair should be done within 7 days.
So garbage is not collected. What is the helpline number?

Nagraj, I've noted that your issue is with garbage not being collected. According to our records, you can contact the BBMP Sahaaya app or call 1533 to report this issue. Please provide your ward number and area name, and immediate pickup will be arranged within 24 hours.
